# LibRaw-WASM Vendor Bundle

This directory vendors `libraw-wasm` 1.6.0 from npm for local browser-side RAW previews.

- Package: `libraw-wasm`
- Repository: https://github.com/ybouane/LibRaw-Wasm
- License: ISC, as declared in the package metadata

Only the runtime browser files are included: `index.js`, `worker.js`, `libraw.js`, and `libraw.wasm`.
